Patch Set 1:

Tests case fsxtest.sh(sanity-benchmark) and fsxtest2.sh(sanityn) both passed local testing of 100 iteration and N as 10000.

fsxtest.sh
~~~~~~~~~~
# cat fsxtest.sh
#!/bin/bash

ret=100
testfile=fsxfile

# llmount.sh is already being called manually
rm -f /mnt/lustre/${testfile}
lfs setstripe -c -1 /mnt/lustre/${testfile}

echo "Starting fsx test"
for run in {1..100}
do
	echo -n "Run [$run] started ..."
	./lustre/tests/fsx -c 50 -p 1000 -S 16997 -P /tmp -l 427050 -N 10000  /mnt/lustre/${testfile} 2>/dev/null 1>&2
	ret=$?
	if [ $ret -ne 0 ]; then
		echo "failed"
		exit
	else
		echo "passed"
	fi

	# Refresh
	rm -f /mnt/lustre/${testfile}
	lfs setstripe -c -1 /mnt/lustre/${testfile}
	sleep 1
done

echo "ALL PASS"


fsxtest2.sh
~~~~~~~~~~~
# cat fsxtest2.sh
#!/bin/bash

ret=100
testfile=fsxfile

# llmount.sh is already being called manually - MOUNT_2="yes" bash ./lustre/tests/llmount.sh
rm -f /mnt/lustre/${testfile}
rm -f /mnt/lustre2/${testfile}
lfs setstripe -c -1 /mnt/lustre/${testfile}

echo "Starting fsx test"
for run in {1..100}
do
	echo -n "Run [$run] started ..."
	./lustre/tests/fsx -c 50 -p 100 -N 10000 -S 0 -l 10485760 /mnt/lustre/${testfile} /mnt/lustre2/${testfile} 2>/dev/null 1>&2
	#./lustre/tests/fsx -c 50 -p 1000 -S 16997 -P /tmp -l 427050 -N 10000  /mnt/lustre/${testfile} 2>/dev/null 1>&2
	ret=$?
	if [ $ret -ne 0 ]; then
		echo "failed"
		exit
	else
		echo "passed"
	fi

	# Refresh
	sleep 1
	rm -f /mnt/lustre/${testfile}
	rm -f /mnt/lustre2/${testfile}
	lfs setstripe -c -1 /mnt/lustre/${testfile}
done

echo "ALL PASS"

parents.subject: LU-14303 tests: parallel-scale test rr_alloc fails

commit.subject: LU-14326 osc: correctly update size/kms for fallocate
commit.message:
LU-14326 osc: correctly update size/kms for fallocate

* fallocate chose oa->o_size for falloc_offset and o->o_blocks for
  falloc_end, but forgot to change attr->cat_size and attr->cat_kms
  to use sa_attr.lvb_size to update osc's lvb and kms if it expands
  the file's size.

  Other setattr IO uses @size (sa_falloc_offset in fallocate case) to
  update the lvb and kms.

* lock request extent for fallocate should be
  [sa_falloc_offset, sa_falloc_end)

* calculate sa_attr.lvb_size correctly for osc objects
  (lov_io_sub_inherit())

Test-Parameters: testlist=sanityn env=ONLY=16,COUNT=50000,ONLY_REPEAT=10
Test-Parameters: testlist=sanity-benchmark env=ONLY=fsx,COUNT=50000,ONLY_REPEAT=10
Signed-off-by: Bobi Jam <bobijam@whamcloud.com>
Fixes: 48457868a02a ("LU-3606 fallocate: Implement fallocate preallocate operation")
Change-Id: I7dbed3bc6899a3db53284c8aac3cb9476e7958f5
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/41272
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Arshad Hussain <arshad.hussain@aeoncomputing.com>
Reviewed-by: Bobi Jam <bobijam@hotmail.com>
Reviewed-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
